Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.state IN ('CO', 'NM') AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT up.bldg_id, up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", up.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up 
WHERE up.upgrade IN (1) AND up.applicability = true GROUP BY up.bldg_id, up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", up.state 
HAVING count(distinct(up.upgrade)) = 1)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/70a95218dbed6350c57f54b9910067f78e7b49f498ab8f32e1aeb3d24375d60b/ebbf8cbf-f0de-430e-ad19-9609e754a8a0/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
